scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=@findarr/shared" "npm run dev --workspace=@findarr/server" "npm run dev --workspace=@findarr/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@findarr/shared && npm run build --workspace=@findarr/client && npm run build --workspace=@findarr/server
scripts.code:check: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.code:fix: npm run type-check && npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run build
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=@findarr/shared && npm run type-check --workspace=@findarr/server && npm run type-check --workspace=@findarr/client
scripts.ci: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm run test
